---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: "type:feature"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What should the app do?

## User Experience

Where should this appear in the app and how should it behave?

## Priority

- P0: release blocker
- P1: important before wider distribution
- P2: useful improvement

## Notes

Related screenshots, examples, or constraints.
